║                                                                            ║
╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝


🎉 CONGRATULATIONS!

Your presentation design skill has been fully optimized and packaged for 
Claude.ai. Everything you need is in this folder.


📋 QUICK START (3 MINUTES)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1. READ THIS FIRST
   👉 Open: README.md (visual overview)

2. INSTALL THE SKILL
   👉 Open: INSTALLATION.txt (step-by-step guide)
   → Upload: presentation-pro-designer.skill to Claude.ai

3. START USING
   → Open Claude.ai
   → Say: "Create a presentation..." or "Edit my PowerPoint..."
   → Skill activates automatically!


📁 FILES IN THIS PACKAGE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ presentation-pro-designer.skill           [41 KB] Main skill (upload this!)
✅ README.md                                 [9 KB] Quick overview
✅ INSTALLATION.txt                          [7 KB] Setup instructions
✅ CLAUDE_GUIDE.md                          [14 KB] Complete user guide
✅ SKILL_SUMMARY.md                         [15 KB] Technical details
✅ presentation-pro-designer.metadata.json   [3 KB] Metadata reference
✅ 00_START_HERE.txt                         [This file]


📖 DOCUMENTATION HIERARCHY
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⏱️  2 MINUTES: Just Install
   1. README.md (skim Key Features)
   2. INSTALLATION.txt (follow 3 steps)
   3. Done!

⏱️  15 MINUTES: Install + Learn
   1. README.md (full)
   2. INSTALLATION.txt (full)
   3. CLAUDE_GUIDE.md (sections 1-2)

⏱️  30 MINUTES: Complete Understanding
   1. README.md
   2. INSTALLATION.txt  
   3. CLAUDE_GUIDE.md (full)
   4. SKILL_SUMMARY.md (optional deep-dive)


🚀 INSTALLATION IN 3 STEPS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

STEP 1: Open Claude.ai
   → https://claude.ai

STEP 2: Go to Settings
   → Settings → Features (or Custom Skills)
   → Click "Upload Skill"

STEP 3: Select File
   → Choose: presentation-pro-designer.skill
   → If your Claude environment supports custom Skill upload, Claude should install or register the package through the current Skills interface.
   → ✅ Done!


💡 ONCE INSTALLED - START USING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Just mention presentations or slides:

✅ "Create a Series A pitch deck for our SaaS startup"
✅ "Edit my PowerPoint and apply our new brand"
✅ "Design a training presentation on our new product"
✅ "Make an investor deck using this financial data"

The skill activates automatically and guides you through the workflow!


🌟 KEY FEATURES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ Automatic Type Detection
   → Classifies: education, corporate, investor, proposal, etc.

🎯 Smart Questioning  
   → Max 5 questions, only when needed

🎨 Design & Brand Authority
   → Your templates control everything

✅ Comprehensive QA
   → All checks before delivery

📊 Source Governance
   → Your uploads first, never fabricates data


📋 SUPPORTED PRESENTATION TYPES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎓 Education & Training      💼 Proposals
🏢 Corporate                 📱 Product/Service  
✅ Verification/Profile      💰 Investor Pitches
📊 Data Reports              ✏️ Editing Existing


🎁 WHAT'S INSIDE THE SKILL
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ Enhanced SKILL.md (Claude-optimized)
✅ 22 Reference Documents (detailed workflows)
✅ 7 Helper Scripts (utilities)
✅ 6 Platform Agents (OpenAI, Gemini, VS Code, etc.)
✅ 20 Test Cases (evaluation)
✅ Design Assets (templates, palettes)

All in one 41 KB .skill file!


❓ COMMON QUESTIONS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Q: Can it edit existing PowerPoint files?
A: Yes! Upload your PPTX and request edits.

Q: Will it use my brand guidelines?
A: Absolutely. Upload your brand guide and it applies everything.

Q: What if I don't have all materials?
A: The skill works with what you provide. It asks for critical pieces.

Q: Can it fabricate financial data?
A: Never. It uses only your data and marks missing data as "DATA NEEDED".

See CLAUDE_GUIDE.md for more FAQ answers.


📞 NEED HELP?
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ INSTALLATION.txt - Setup guide
✅ CLAUDE_GUIDE.md - Complete user guide + FAQ
✅ SKILL_SUMMARY.md - Technical details
